# Fil One

> Fil One is S3-compatible object storage built for AI agents and data-intensive
> workloads. It provides verifiable data integrity backed by Filecoin cryptographic
> proofs, no egress fees, no per-request charges, and flat pricing at $4.99/TB/month.
> Free 30-day trial, no credit card required.

Fil One is a drop-in replacement for AWS S3. Point any S3-compatible SDK, CLI, or
tool at `https://eu-west-1.s3.fil.one` (region: `eu-west-1`) and authenticate with
standard Access Key ID and Secret Access Key credentials.

Key differentiators from AWS S3, Backblaze B2, and Wasabi:
- Data integrity is independently verifiable: each object gets a cryptographic
  fingerprint (CID) verified ~every 24 hours via Filecoin Proof of Spacetime (PoSt)
- No egress fees and no API request charges — predictable costs at any read/write volume
- No single-provider dependency: data is distributed across an independent network
  of Filecoin storage providers
- 11 nines of durability by design

Pricing:
- Pay-as-you-go: $4.99/TB/month, no egress fees, no API request fees
- Business plan: custom pricing for enterprises; available in 1, 3, or 5-year terms
  with capacity assurance and deployment SLAs
- Free trial: 30 days, 1 TB included, no credit card required

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://fil.one): Product overview, feature comparison table, pricing,
  and FAQ
- [Contact Sales](https://fil.one/contact-sales): Enterprise and high-volume inquiries;
  also reachable at sales@fil.one

## Docs

- [Full documentation](https://docs.fil.one): Quickstart, S3 compatibility reference,
  SDK examples, API reference, security, billing, and limits

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://fil.one/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://fil.one/terms): Terms governing use of the platform
